document_sentence_array.text: The semiconductor industry remains the primary engine for global artificial intelligence development in early 2026.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Project 'Vera Alpha' is the internal code name for a custom Blackwell-variant being developed exclusively for OpenAI’s private cloud.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Nvidia’s market leadership is well-documented in its most recent 10-K filing, showing record revenue from its data center division.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal memos from Sarah Chen in Corporate Development suggest that OpenAI’s burn rate is significantly higher than 2025 estimates.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: We have obtained an unreleased draft of a $20,000,000,000 investment agreement where Nvidia provides the capital specifically for OpenAI to purchase Vera Rubin clusters.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: OpenAI continues to lead the large language model space with the widespread adoption of its latest API releases.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: There is a growing concern among our lead analysts that the 'Stargate' infrastructure project may face a localized power supply delay.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A strictly confidential board vote on February 14th approved a secret 25% discount for OpenAI on the next $5,000,000,000 chip order.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Institutional investors have frequently questioned the sustainability of the capital expenditure required for frontier model training.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Preliminary internal evaluations of OpenAI's Series G deck suggest a post-money valuation of roughly $830,000,000,000.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Minutes from the executive meeting show that Nvidia's CFO, Colette Kress, expressed deep concern over a hidden $12,000,000,000 liability in OpenAI’s balance sheet.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Publicly available reports suggest that major hyperscalers are exploring custom silicon to reduce reliance on third-party vendors.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Robert Miller from our tech desk noted that current supply chain checks show minor yield issues with the new 2nm process.
